tools.description: Read the persisted Apple-Tools assistant defaults and routing preferences.
tools.name: apple_get_preferences
tools.title: Apple Get Preferences
tools.usage_intent: Read the persisted Apple-Tools assistant defaults and routing preferences.

tools.description: Detect sensible default mail, calendar, reminders, and notes targets, then persist them if missing.
tools.name: apple_detect_defaults
tools.title: Apple Detect Defaults
tools.usage_intent: Detect sensible default mail, calendar, reminders, and notes targets, then persist them if missing.

tools.description: Persist assistant defaults such as default lists, folders, calendars, archive mailboxes, and preferred communication routing.
tools.name: apple_update_preferences
tools.title: Apple Update Preferences
tools.usage_intent: Persist assistant defaults such as default lists, folders, calendars, archive mailboxes, and preferred communication routing.

tools.description: Detect the preferred Notes folder for daily and weekly digests, and persist it if found.
tools.name: apple_detect_digest_folder
tools.title: Apple Detect Digest Folder
tools.usage_intent: Detect the preferred Notes folder for daily and weekly digests, and persist it if found.

tools.description: Persist the dedicated Notes folder that Apple-Tools should use for daily and weekly digests.
tools.name: apple_set_digest_folder
tools.title: Apple Set Digest Folder
tools.usage_intent: Persist the dedicated Notes folder that Apple-Tools should use for daily and weekly digests.

tools.description: Ensure a dedicated Notes folder exists for daily and weekly digests, creating it when necessary and persisting the preference.
tools.name: apple_ensure_digest_folder
tools.title: Apple Ensure Digest Folder
tools.usage_intent: Ensure a dedicated Notes folder exists for daily and weekly digests, creating it when necessary and persisting the preference.

tools.description: Persist preferred communication routing for a specific contact so Apple-Tools can choose the right channel and target for that person.
tools.name: apple_update_contact_preferences
tools.title: Apple Update Contact Preferences
tools.usage_intent: Persist preferred communication routing for a specific contact so Apple-Tools can choose the right channel and target for that person.

tools.description: Resolve a recipient through Contacts, evaluate available channels, and return the recommended mail or messages target before sending.
tools.name: apple_prepare_communication
tools.title: Apple Prepare Communication
tools.usage_intent: Resolve a recipient through Contacts, evaluate available channels, and return the recommended mail or messages target before sending.

tools.description: Preview how Apple-Tools will route a communication before sending it through Messages or Mail.
tools.name: apple_preview_communication
tools.title: Apple Preview Communication
tools.usage_intent: Preview how Apple-Tools will route a communication before sending it through Messages or Mail.

tools.description: Preview how Apple-Tools will archive a Mail message before moving it.
tools.name: apple_preview_archive_message
tools.title: Apple Preview Archive Message
tools.usage_intent: Preview how Apple-Tools will archive a Mail message before moving it.

aliases: apple preview create reminder with defaults
tools.description: Preview how Apple-Tools will create a reminder with the configured default reminder list.
tools.name: apple_preview_create_reminder_with_defaults
tools.title: Apple Preview Create Reminder With Defaults
tools.usage_intent: Preview how Apple-Tools will create a reminder with the configured default reminder list.

aliases: apple preview create note with defaults
tools.description: Preview how Apple-Tools will create a note with the configured default notes folder.
tools.name: apple_preview_create_note_with_defaults
tools.title: Apple Preview Create Note With Defaults
tools.usage_intent: Preview how Apple-Tools will create a note with the configured default notes folder.

aliases: apple preview follow up from mail
tools.description: Preview how Apple-Tools will turn an email into a reminder and note before creating either item.
tools.name: apple_preview_follow_up_from_mail
tools.title: Apple Preview Follow-Up From Mail
tools.usage_intent: Preview how Apple-Tools will turn an email into a reminder and note before creating either item.

tools.description: Send a communication through Messages or Mail using Contacts resolution and assistant defaults.
tools.name: apple_send_communication
tools.title: Apple Send Communication
tools.usage_intent: Send a communication through Messages or Mail using Contacts resolution and assistant defaults.

tools.description: Move a message to the preferred archive mailbox, or auto-detect an archive mailbox if no preference exists yet.
tools.name: apple_archive_message
tools.title: Apple Archive Message
tools.usage_intent: Move a message to the preferred archive mailbox, or auto-detect an archive mailbox if no preference exists yet.

tools.description: List recent assistant actions recorded by Apple-Tools for audit and undo workflows.
tools.name: apple_list_recent_actions
tools.title: Apple List Recent Actions
tools.usage_intent: List recent assistant actions recorded by Apple-Tools for audit and undo workflows.

tools.description: Undo a recent Apple-Tools action when the underlying standalone MCPs support a reliable reversal.
tools.name: apple_undo_action
tools.title: Apple Undo Action
tools.usage_intent: Undo a recent Apple-Tools action when the underlying standalone MCPs support a reliable reversal.

tools.description: Create a reminder using the configured default reminder list when list_id is omitted.
tools.name: apple_create_reminder_with_defaults
tools.title: Apple Create Reminder With Defaults
tools.usage_intent: Create a reminder using the configured default reminder list when list_id is omitted.

tools.description: Create a note using the configured default notes folder when folder_id is omitted.
tools.name: apple_create_note_with_defaults
tools.title: Apple Create Note With Defaults
tools.usage_intent: Create a note using the configured default notes folder when folder_id is omitted.

aliases: apple capture follow up from mail
tools.description: Turn an email into a reminder and an archival note using assistant defaults for the destination list and notes folder.
tools.name: apple_capture_follow_up_from_mail
tools.title: Apple Capture Follow-Up From Mail
tools.usage_intent: Turn an email into a reminder and an archival note using assistant defaults for the destination list and notes folder.

tools.description: Summarize attendee state for a shared calendar event so agents can verify collaboration and participation.
tools.name: apple_event_collaboration_summary
tools.title: Apple Event Collaboration Summary
tools.usage_intent: Summarize attendee state for a shared calendar event so agents can verify collaboration and participation.

tools.description: Search places through the native Apple Maps MCP and fail closed if the Maps helper is unavailable.
tools.name: apple_maps_search_places_strict
tools.title: Apple Maps Search Places Strict
tools.usage_intent: Search places through the native Apple Maps MCP and fail closed if the Maps helper is unavailable.

tools.description: Get directions through the native Apple Maps MCP and fail closed if the Maps helper is unavailable.
tools.name: apple_maps_get_directions_strict
tools.title: Apple Maps Get Directions Strict
tools.usage_intent: Get directions through the native Apple Maps MCP and fail closed if the Maps helper is unavailable.

tools.description: Find likely duplicate contacts through Apple Contacts so assistants can disambiguate people before acting.
tools.name: apple_find_duplicate_contacts
tools.title: Apple Find Duplicate Contacts
tools.usage_intent: Find likely duplicate contacts through Apple Contacts so assistants can disambiguate people before acting.

tools.description: Resolve a contact for a person-targeted workflow, but stop and return duplicate groups if likely duplicate records need cleanup first.
tools.name: apple_prepare_unique_contact
tools.title: Apple Prepare Unique Contact
tools.usage_intent: Resolve a contact for a person-targeted workflow, but stop and return duplicate groups if likely duplicate records need cleanup first.

tools.description: List likely shortcuts for a requested capability so Apple-Tools can use Shortcuts as an intentional bridge when native coverage is missing.
tools.name: apple_list_shortcuts_for_capability
tools.title: Apple List Shortcuts For Capability
tools.usage_intent: List likely shortcuts for a requested capability so Apple-Tools can use Shortcuts as an intentional bridge when native coverage is missing.

tools.description: Use Apple Shortcuts as the explicit bridge when native Apple MCP coverage is insufficient or when the user names a shortcut directly.
tools.name: apple_route_or_run_shortcut
tools.title: Apple Route Or Run Shortcut
tools.usage_intent: Use Apple Shortcuts as the explicit bridge when native Apple MCP coverage is insufficient or when the user names a shortcut directly.

tools.description: Open an application through the unified Apple control plane using its name or bundle identifier.
tools.name: apple_open_application
tools.title: Apple Open Application
tools.usage_intent: Open an application through the unified Apple control plane using its name or bundle identifier.

tools.description: Return truthful Focus support metadata through the unified Apple control plane.
tools.name: apple_get_focus_status
tools.title: Apple Get Focus Status
tools.usage_intent: Return truthful Focus support metadata through the unified Apple control plane.

tools.description: Return a richer Apple system context snapshot, including Focus, frontmost app, and battery state.
tools.name: apple_get_system_context
tools.title: Apple Get System Context
tools.usage_intent: Return a richer Apple system context snapshot, including Focus, frontmost app, and battery state.

tools.description: Open a file or folder through Apple Files and return iCloud-aware path metadata.
tools.name: apple_open_file_path
tools.title: Apple Open File Path
tools.usage_intent: Open a file or folder through Apple Files and return iCloud-aware path metadata.

tools.description: Reveal a file or folder in Finder through Apple Files.
tools.name: apple_reveal_in_finder
tools.title: Apple Reveal In Finder
tools.usage_intent: Reveal a file or folder in Finder through Apple Files.

tools.description: Read, replace, add, or remove Finder tags on a file or folder through Apple Files.
tools.name: apple_tag_file
tools.title: Apple Tag File
tools.usage_intent: Read, replace, add, or remove Finder tags on a file or folder through Apple Files.

tools.description: Apply an assistant-relevant macOS setting through the unified Apple control plane.

tools.usage_intent: Apply an assistant-relevant macOS setting through the unified Apple control plane.

tools.usage_intent: Use the unified Apple control plane for bounded GUI fallback actions when a native app-domain tool cannot complete the task.
